title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Electricals - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Electricals - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!
